case_title: RHODENA MIXON VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIXON, RHODENA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIXON, RHODENA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AMENDED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED TO MANUEL URBANO -RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MIXON, RHODENA AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2011 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO DEC-01-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR JUDGE MITCHELL TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
